design_philosophy.vibe: Uber for Cleaning but more robust. Construction-grade reliability meets hospitality-grade service.

usage_rules.primary: Use for primary CTAs, active states, and high-visibility highlights.
usage_rules.secondary: Use for structural elements, footers, and secondary actions.
usage_rules.background: Cream/White for main content areas to maintain a clean, professional look.
usage_rules.gradients: FORBIDDEN. Use flat, solid colors only.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFC107] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#F59E0B] rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-sm active:translate-y-0.5 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#18181B] text-white hover:bg-[#27272A] rounded-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#18181B] text-[#18181B] hover:bg-[#18181B] hover:text-white rounded-sm font-bold uppercase

cards.service: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#FFC107] transition-all group cursor-pointer
cards.booking: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl shadow-sm p-4

inputs.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 hover:border-[#FFC107] bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-8 text-center cursor-pointer transition-colors

navigation.mobile_bottom: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 h-16 flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.admin_sidebar: bg-[#18181B] text-white w-64 min-h-screen hidden md:block

placeholders.logo: Use text 'FREEMAN' in Barlow Condensed Bold, 4xl

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on Yellow background is ALWAYS Black (#1A1A1A), never White.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION ORDER: Components -> Layouts -> Pages -> Logic.
2. THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to match the 'Industrial Professional' palette immediately.
3. MOBILE FIRST: Always verify layouts on mobile viewport width (375px) first.
4. ADMIN PANEL: Should be treated as a separate 'App' within the app. Use a different layout wrapper (SidebarLayout).
5. BOOKING FLOW: Use a 'Wizard' or 'Stepper' pattern. Do not show one giant form.
6. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Map them intelligently to the 22 services.
7. DO NOT BREAK BACKEND: The tRPC/Drizzle backend is sacred. Only touch frontend files.
8. FILE UPLOAD: Use a visual drag-and-drop zone, even on mobile (tap to select).
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters.
